The '''''Rampaging Ranat''''' was a modified [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[YT-2400 light freighter/Legends|YT-2400 light freighter]] owned by the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Az-Iban]], and later the [[Disac pirates|Disac pirate]] [[Morturr Heth]].

{{Ship-stub}}
